data.en: It was Sunday.
data.hint: It 作代词指代时间，was 过去式。

data.en: I never get up early on Sundays.
data.cn: 而在星期天我是从来不早起的。
data.hint: never 频度副词放在谓语动词 get up 之前；on Sundays 表示在星期天。
accept: On Sundays I never get up early.

data.en: I sometimes stay in bed until lunchtime.
data.cn: 有时我要一直躺到吃午饭的时候。
data.hint: sometimes 频度副词，until 直到...。
accept: Sometimes I stay in bed until lunchtime.

data.en: Last Sunday I got up very late.
data.cn: 上个星期天，我起得很晚。
data.hint: Last Sunday 表示过去的时间，用动词过去式 got up。
accept: I got up very late last Sunday.

data.en: I looked out of the window.
data.hint: look out of... 往...外面看。

data.en: It was dark outside.
data.hint: outside 作副词在句尾表示外面。

data.en: What a day!
data.hint: what 引导的名词性省略感叹句。

data.en: It's raining again.
data.hint: It's raining 是现在进行时表示“天正在下雨”。

data.en: Just then, the telephone rang.
data.hint: rang 是 ring 的过去式。
accept: The telephone rang just then.

data.en: It was my aunt Lucy.
data.hint: aunt 亲属称谓名词，Lucy 专有名词大写。

data.en: I've just arrived by train.
data.hint: I've just arrived 是现在完成时，by train 乘火车。

data.en: I'm coming to see you.
data.hint: I'm coming 现在进行时表近期按计划或安排要进行的动作。

data.en: But I'm still having breakfast.
data.hint: still 依然，表示动作的延续，breakfast 早餐。

data.en: What are you doing?
data.hint: 进行时态的特殊疑问句。

data.en: I'm having breakfast.
data.hint: have breakfast 吃早饭的进行时形式。

data.en: Do you always get up so late?
data.hint: 一般现在时的疑问句，always 频度副词，so late 这么晚。

data.en: It's one o'clock!
data.hint: 表示整点时间用 o'clock。

data.en: Why was the writer's aunt surprised?
data.cn: 作者的姑母为什么感到惊讶？
data.hint: surprised 感到惊讶的，作表语。

data.en: She was surprised because it was one o'clock.
data.cn: 她感到惊讶是因为已经一点钟了。
data.hint: because 引导原因状语从句。

data.en: The writer was having breakfast at lunchtime.
data.cn: 作者在午餐时间吃早餐。
data.hint: at lunchtime 在午餐时间。

data.en: He is still sleeping.
data.hint: 现在进行时表示当下正在发生的动作。

data.en: He rarely gets up before ten o'clock.
data.hint: rarely 表示极少，gets up 主语为单数第三人称。
accept: Before ten o'clock he rarely gets up.

data.en: We're enjoying our lunch.
data.hint: We're enjoying 现在进行时，our lunch 我们的午餐。

data.en: We frequently have lunch at this restaurant.
data.cn: 我们经常在这家餐馆吃午饭。
data.hint: frequently 频度副词，at this restaurant 在这家餐馆。
accept: Frequently we have lunch at this restaurant.

data.en: I am reading in bed.
data.hint: in bed 在床上，不加冠词。

data.en: Do you ever read in bed?
data.cn: 你有没有在床上看过书？
data.hint: ever 意为“曾经，在任何时候”。

data.en: The children are playing football in the street now.
data.cn: 孩子们现在正在街上踢足球。
data.hint: are playing 进行时态，in the street 在街上。
accept: Now the children are playing football in the street.
The children are playing football now in the street.

data.en: They always play football in the street.
data.hint: always 频度副词，play 原形，因为主语是 They。
accept: In the street they always play football.

data.en: Now a little boy is kicking the ball.
data.cn: 现在一个小男孩正在踢球。
data.hint: kicking 踢（现在分词）。
accept: A little boy is kicking the ball now.

data.en: Another boy is running after him.
data.hint: run after 追赶。

data.en: My friends never come to visit me.
data.cn: 我的朋友们从来不来看我。
data.hint: come to do sth 来做某事，never 放在 come 之前。

data.en: I frequently go to bed hungry.
data.hint: go to bed 睡觉，hungry 形容词作状语或表语，表示状态。
accept: Frequently I go to bed hungry.

data.en: I rarely listen to the radio.
data.hint: listen to 听（固定搭配）。
accept: Rarely I listen to the radio.

data.en: I always feel cold in this house.
data.cn: 在这所房子里我总是感到冷。
data.hint: always 频度副词，feel cold 感到冷。
accept: In this house I always feel cold.

data.en: She rarely answers my letters.
data.hint: answers 动词单三，my letters 我的信件。
accept: Rarely she answers my letters.

data.en: We never work after six o'clock.
data.cn: 我们六点以后从不工作。
data.hint: after six o'clock 六点钟之后。
accept: After six o'clock we never work.

data.en: The shops always close on Saturday afternoons.
data.cn: 商店总是在星期六下午关门。
data.hint: on Saturday afternoons 表示在每个星期六的下午。
accept: On Saturday afternoons the shops always close.

data.en: Do you always go to work by car?
data.hint: go to work 去上班，by car 乘小汽车。

data.en: Our teacher frequently collects our exercise books.
data.cn: 我们的老师经常收我们的练习本。
data.hint: collects 收集，exercise books 练习本。
accept: Frequently our teacher collects our exercise books.

data.en: We sometimes spend our holidays abroad.
data.hint: spend holidays 度假，abroad 副词，表示去国外，不加介词。
accept: Sometimes we spend our holidays abroad.

data.en: What a terrible day!
data.hint: What + a/an + 形容词 + 单数可数名词 + !

data.en: What a beautiful picture this is!
data.cn: 这是一幅多么美丽的画啊！
data.hint: 完整的感叹句：What + 名词短语 + 主语 + 谓语！
accept: What a beautiful picture!

data.en: What a wonderful garden!
data.hint: 省略的感叹句，名词复数或单数名词前加冠词 a/an。

data.en: What a surprise!
data.hint: surprise 此处为名词，表示令人吃惊的人或事。

data.en: He is causing a lot of trouble.
data.hint: cause trouble 制造麻烦，a lot of 许多。

data.en: What wonderful actors they are!
data.cn: 他们是多么优秀的演员啊！
data.hint: What 引导感叹句修饰复数可数名词 actors，不用冠词 a/an。
accept: What wonderful actors!

data.en: What a hard-working woman she is!
data.cn: 她是多么勤劳的一个女人啊！
data.hint: hard-working 勤劳的，复合形容词。
accept: What a hard-working woman!

data.en: What a tall building it is!
data.cn: 它是多么高的一栋楼啊！
data.hint: What + a + tall + building + it + is!
accept: What a tall building!

data.en: What a terrible film!
data.hint: What + a + terrible + film!

data.en: What a strange guy he is!
data.cn: 他是多么奇怪的一个家伙啊！
data.hint: strange guy 奇怪的家伙，guy 常用口语词。
accept: What a strange guy!
